attacking_style: Opportunistic breakaway specialist who capitalizes on scenarios where sprint teams are compromised or distracted by classification battles, rather than pure attacking power.
team_tactics: Benefits from team tactics designed for other objectives (e.g., green jersey defense creating breakaway opportunities). Teams willing to sacrifice immediate sprint opportunities to enable his stage hunting.
terrain_preference: Stage profiles where sprinter teams are conflicted or weakened; strong time trialist capabilities (35km TT runner-up) suggest suitability for hard, sustained efforts rather than explosive climbing.
vulnerability: Likely struggles when pure sprinter teams are fully committed to controlling the race; requires specific race situations rather than imposing himself through dominant strength.
key_patterns: Wins from breakaways when sprint teams are disrupted by other classification battles (2020 TdF example).
Strong time trial capabilities suggest high-wattage endurance over explosive acceleration (2nd in 35km TT).
Developed as all-rounder profile, capable of both stage wins and TT performance at Grand Tours.
form_trajectory: positive: Progressed from promising 23-year-old TT talent (2018) to Grand Tour stage winner (2020), suggesting successful development trajectory.
